DRUNK（The Drunkard）

Strong liquor burns the throat; drunkenness is unavoidable.

Why are you swaying? Why do your emotions run so high? Why do things look doubled? Because what flows in your body is not blood but liquor. You are the kind of person who pours baijiu into a thermos and drinks it like water. DRUNK is the mighty white liquor that burns, boils, and turns you into a poet at the dinner table and a man hugging the toilet at midnight. By 10 a.m. the next day, you finally understand that the loud, confident person from last night has become a drunkard.

Think you might be {{code}}? Take the test and find out!
